text:
Sunset's just past us and it's still a gorgeous evening out there, clear skies, 82 and dry with that low humidity making it feel easy. If you're heading out tonight, mostly clear and comfortable is the story, with lows settling into the low 60s under a light southeast breeze. No reason to think twice about an evening walk or a late dinner on the patio.

Saturday keeps the good times rolling: sunny and warmer, high near 87, with high pressure firmly in charge. The lake backs that up nicely, south winds 10 to 15 knots and waves holding at 1 to 2 feet, so it'll be a solid boating and paddling day, just watch for a bit more chop by afternoon as that breeze builds. Water's a very swimmable 71 degrees. The models are tight on this one, so I'd trust the forecast as given, no surprises expected. Enjoy it while it lasts, since the forecasters are already watching rain work back into the picture by Sunday night into next week.
